search: | `discover_instances` | `discover_idxc` | `discover_shc` | `discover_sh` | `discover_hf` | `discover_premium` | `discover_label` | table splunk_server lower_splunk_server name label host host_fqdn host_resolved serverName guid role is_search_head is_connected isForwarding num_searches | outputlookup scma_splunk_instance_info_lookup CreateInApp=true Create_Empty=true | eval severity_level = case ( isnull(label) OR isnull(role), 1, is_connected="no", 2, true(), 0) | fields - splunk_server lower_splunk_server label host host_fqdn host_resolved serverName guid | `scma_summarize_data("scma_splunk_instance_info")`

| rest `scma_rest_timeout` splunk_server=local /services/search/distributed/peers search="status=Up disabled=0" | eval instance=coalesce(title, peerName, host_fqdn, host) | `scma_instance_info(host)` | fields instance, label, name, guid server_roles search_groups cpu_arch os_name numberOfCores physicalMemoryMB version | rename numberOfCores AS cpu_count physicalMemoryMB AS mem version AS splunk_version server_roles AS inherited_server_roles | where isnull(mvfind(search_groups,"dmc_group_|dmc_customgroup_")) | eval severity_level=3 | table name splunk_version inherited_server_roles cpu_arch os_name cpu_count mem severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("precheck_unconfigured_mc_instances")`
| inputlookup scma_customer_details where _key=customer_name | eval severity_level=if(len(value)<=1,3,0) | table value severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("precheck_customer_set")`

| inputlookup scma_customer_details where _key=license_core | transpose 0 header_field=_key | fields - column | stats last(license_core) as value | eval severity_level=if(value = 0, 3, 0) | table value severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("precheck_core_license_set")`

| union [| rest `scma_rest_timeout` /servicesNS/-/-/saved/searches add_orphan_field=true search="orphan=1" splunk_server=* | rename eai:acl.* as * | eval conf="savedsearches" | stats dc(title) as num_objects values(title) as object by conf splunk_server app owner ] [| rest `scma_rest_timeout` /servicesNS/-/-/admin/directory search="eai:orphaned=1 eai:type!=savedsearch" splunk_server=* | rename eai:acl.* as * | eval conf="directory" | stats dc(title) as num_objects values(title) as object by conf splunk_server app owner ] | `scma_instance_info(splunk_server)` | eval object=mvjoin(object,",") | eval severity_level = 2 | table name conf app object num_objects severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("search_orphaned_objects")`

| inputlookup scma_customer_details | rename _* AS * | transpose 0 header_field=key | fields cloud_env cloud_provider customer_name encryption_at_rest license_* scma_app_version | where isnotnull(license_core) | foreach license_es license_pci license_itsi [| eval premium_app_count=if('<<FIELD>>'>0,mvappend(premium_app_count,"1"),mvappend(premium_app_count,""))] | eventstats sum(premium_app_count) AS premium_app_count | eval severity_level = 1 | table customer_name cloud_env cloud_provider encryption_at_rest license_core license_es license_itsi license_model license_pci premium_app_count scma_app_version severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("scma_detail_gen")`

`scma_source_internal_index` source=*license_usage.log earliest=-7d@d latest=@d TERM(Usage) | bin _time span=1h | eval day=strftime(_time,"%d"), hour=strftime(_time,"%H") | stats sum(b) AS total_b_hour by _time day hour | stats avg(total_b_hour) AS avg_b by hour | eventstats sum(avg_b) AS total_b | eval pct_used=round((avg_b/total_b),4) | eval severity_level = 1 | table hour pct_used severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("licensing_hourly_average_ingestion")`

search_name: Environment Inventory and Splunk Versions - Instance Counts by Role and Resources
search: | rest `scma_rest_timeout` splunk_server=* /servicesNS/-/-/server/info | eval physical_memory_gb = round(physicalMemoryMB / 1024, 0) | `scma_instance_info(splunk_server)` | stats sum(numberOfVirtualCores) as sumOfVirtualCores sum(numberOfCores) as sumOfPhysicalCores Sum(physical_memory_gb) as physical_memory_gb last(os_name) as os_name last(version) as version last(name) as name values(server_roles) as instance_roles dc(splunk_server) as instance_count by label | eval instance_roles = mvjoin(instance_roles,":") , cpu_core_count = sumOfVirtualCores | eval severity_level=if(os_name!="Linux", 2, 0) | eval signature=if(os_name!="Linux", "Non-Linux based operating system is detected", "OK") | table name cpu_core_count instance_count instance_roles os_name physical_memory_gb severity_level signature sumOfPhysicalCores sumOfVirtualCores version | `scma_summarize_data("environment_instance_inventory")`

| rest `scma_rest_timeout` /servicesNS/-/-/data/indexes datatype=all search="isInternal=0 disabled=0" splunk_server=* | `scma_instance_info(splunk_server)` | where name LIKE "idx%" | eval retentionInDays=round(frozenTimePeriodInSecs/86400,0) | stats dc(splunk_server) AS dc_instance max(retentionInDays) AS max_retentionInDays avg(retentionInDays) AS avg_retentionInDays min(retentionInDays) AS min_retentionInDays values(enableDataIntegrityControl) AS enableDataIntegrityControl values(enableTsidxReduction) as enableTsidxReduction values(timePeriodInSecBeforeTsidxReduction) as timePeriodInSecBeforeTsidxReduction values(tsidxReductionCheckPeriodInSec) as tsidxReductionCheckPeriodInSec values(coldToFrozenScript) as coldToFrozenScript values(warmToColdScript) as warmToColdScript values(coldToFrozenDir) as coldToFrozenDir last(name) as name by label, title | eval severity_level = case ( max_retentionInDays!=avg_retentionInDays OR enableDataIntegrityControl!=0, 2, (isnotnull(coldToFrozenScript) AND coldToFrozenScript!="") OR (isnotnull(warmToColdScript) AND warmToColdScript!="") OR (isnotnull(coldToFrozenDir) AND coldToFrozenDir!=""), 2, true(),0) | eval signature = case( severity_level!=0 AND max_retentionInDays!=avg_retentionInDays, "The max_retentionInDays does not match the avg_retentionInDays, there is a mismatch in the index retention configuration." , severity_level!=0 AND enableDataIntegrityControl!=0,"The enableDataIntegrityControl feature has been enabled on an index, this is not supported in Splunk Cloud.", (isnotnull(coldToFrozenScript) AND coldToFrozenScript!="") OR (isnotnull(warmToColdScript) AND warmToColdScript!="") OR (isnotnull(coldToFrozenDir) AND coldToFrozenDir!=""), "Archival may be enabled for this index!", true(), "N/A") | rename title AS orig_index | table name orig_index avg_retentionInDays dc_instance enableDataIntegrityControl enableTsidxReduction max_retentionInDays min_retentionInDays timePeriodInSecBeforeTsidxReduction tsidxReductionCheckPeriodInSec coldToFrozenDir coldToFrozenScript warmToColdScript severity_level signature `scma_comment("#REDACT| foreach orig_index [| eval <<FIELD>> = sha256(<<FIELD>>) ] #REDACT")` | `scma_summarize_data("indexing_index_inventory")`

search_name: Indexing - Splunk Cloud Estimated Storage Blocks
search: `scma_source_internal_index` source=*license_usage.log TERM(Usage) earliest=-7d@d latest=@d b>0 | `scma_instance_info(host)` | eval idx=if(idx="default", "main", idx) | bin span=1d _time | stats sum(b) AS b by idx _time | eval gb=b/1024/1024/1024 | stats avg(gb) AS avg_daily_volume_gb by idx | eventstats sum(avg_daily_volume_gb) AS total_daily_volume_gb | eval volume_license_used_pct=avg_daily_volume_gb/total_daily_volume_gb, volume_license_used_pct=round(volume_license_used_pct,2), total_daily_volume_gb=round(total_daily_volume_gb,2), avg_daily_volume_gb=round(avg_daily_volume_gb,2) | rename idx AS orig_index | join orig_index type=outer [| rest `scma_rest_timeout` splunk_server=* /servicesNS/-/-/data/indexes datatype=all search="isInternal=0 disabled=0" | eval retentionInDays=round(frozenTimePeriodInSecs/86400,0) | stats mode(retentionInDays) AS avg_retentionInDays by title | rename title AS orig_index] | fillnull value="unknown" | eval severity_level = 1 | table orig_index avg_daily_volume_gb avg_retentionInDays total_daily_volume_gb volume_license_used_pct severity_level `scma_comment("#REDACT| foreach orig_index [| eval <<FIELD>> = sha256(<<FIELD>>) ] #REDACT")` | `scma_summarize_data("indexing_splunk_cloud_storage_blocks")`

| rest `scma_rest_timeout` splunk_server=* /servicesNS/-/-/data/indexes datatype=all search="isInternal=0 disabled=0 currentDBSizeMB > 1" | `scma_instance_info(splunk_server)` | stats dc(title) AS total_indexes | `get_cloud_limits(indexing_index_counts)` | eval value=total_indexes, limit=limit_classic | eval severity_level=if(total_indexes>=limit,2,0) | eval severity_level_classic=if(total_indexes>=limit_classic,2,0) | eval severity_level_victoria=if(total_indexes>=limit_victoria,2,0) | table total_indexes value limit limit_classic limit_victoria severity_level severity_level_classic severity_level_victoria | `scma_summarize_data("indexing_index_counts")`

| rest `scma_rest_timeout` splunk_server=* /servicesNS/-/-/data/indexes datatype=all search="isInternal=0 disabled=0" | eval retentionInDays=round(frozenTimePeriodInSecs/86400,0) | stats max(retentionInDays) AS max_retentionInDays avg(retentionInDays) AS avg_retentionInDays, p95(retentionInDays) AS p95_retentionInDays | eval value=round(avg_retentionInDays,0) | `get_cloud_limits(indexing_data_retention_check)` | eval limit=limit_classic | eval avg_retentionInDays=round(avg_retentionInDays,0), p95_retentionInDays=round(p95_retentionInDays) | eval severity_level=if(avg_retentionInDays>=limit,2,0) | eval severity_level_classic=if(avg_retentionInDays>=limit_classic,2,0) | eval severity_level_victoria=if(avg_retentionInDays>=limit_victoria,2,0) | table avg_retentionInDays p95_retentionInDays value max_retentionInDays limit limit_classic limit_victoria severity_level severity_level_classic severity_level_victoria | `scma_summarize_data("indexing_data_retention_check")`

| rest `scma_rest_timeout` /servicesNS/-/-/licenser/licenses search="status=\"VALID\" (label!=\"Splunk Forwarder\" label!=\"Splunk Free\" label!=\"Splunk Light Free\")" splunk_server=* | rename label as license_label , status as license_status | `scma_instance_info(splunk_server)` | eval type = if(match(sourcetypes,"^itsi_"), "ITSI", type) | eval severity_level = if(license_status = "VALID", 0, 3) | stats last(*) as * by type license_label | table name type license_label quota creation_time expiration_time group_id stack_id sourcetypes license_status severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("licensing_current_entitlements")`

`scma_source_internal_index` source=*license_usage.log* type="RolloverSummary" b>0 earliest=-30d@d latest=@d | fields _time, slave, pool, stacksz, b | bin span=1d _time | eval stacksz = if(stack="enterprise", stacksz, 0) | stats latest(b) AS b max(stacksz) as stacksz by slave, pool, _time | stats sum(b) AS b max(stacksz) as stacksz by _time | eval stacksz=round(stacksz/1024/1024/1024) | eval daily_volume_gb = round(b/1024/1024/1024,2) | rename _time AS license_time | convert ctime(license_time) | eval severity_level = 1 | join [| inputlookup scma_customer_details where _key=license_core | rename value AS license_core] | eval license_core = if(license_core=0, stacksz, license_core) | table license_time b daily_volume_gb license_core severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("licensing_current_volumes")`

`scma_source_internal_index` sourcetype=splunkd component=LicenseUsage type=RolloverSummary stack=enterprise earliest=-48h | fields _time stack stacksz | stats latest(*) as * BY stack | eval license_core=round(stacksz/1024/1024/1024) | fields license_core | appendcols [| inputlookup scma_customer_details where _key=license_* _key!=license_core | transpose 0 header_field=_key | fields - column ] | eval balanced_license_es = case ( license_es = 0, "N/A:" . license_es, license_es / license_core * 100 < 20, "No, seek Deal Desk approval for unbalanced Premium apps below 20% capacity:" . license_core, license_es > license_core, "Premium license larger than Core license:" . license_es / license_core * 100, true(), "OK:" . license_es / license_core * 100) | eval balanced_license_pci = case ( license_pci = 0, "N/A:" . license_pci, license_pci / license_core * 100 < 20, "No, seek Deal Desk approval for unbalanced Premium apps below 20% capacity:" . license_core, license_pci > license_core, "Premium license larger than Core license:" . license_pci / license_core * 100, true(), "OK:" . license_pci / license_core *100) | eval balanced_license_itsi = case ( license_itsi = 0, "N/A:" . license_itsi, license_itsi / license_core * 100 < 20, "No, seek Deal Desk approval for unbalanced Premium apps below 20% capacity:" . license_core, license_itsi > license_core, "Premium license larger than Core license:" . license_itsi / license_core * 100, true(), "OK:" . license_itsi / license_core *100) | fields - license_* | transpose | join column [| inputlookup scma_customer_details where _key=license_* _key!=license_core | eval column="balanced_"._key ] | rename column as balanced_check "row 1" as status | rex field=status mode=sed "s/:\d+//g" | `get_cloud_limits(licensing_premium_app_balanced)` | eval limit=limit_classic | eval severity_level=case(status=="N/A",-1,status=="No, seek Deal Desk approval for unbalanced Premium apps below 20% capacity", 2, status=="OK", 0,status=="Premium license larger than Core license",3,1=1,"OK") | eval severity_level_classic=case(status=="N/A",-1,status=="No, seek Deal Desk approval for unbalanced Premium apps below 20% capacity", 2, status=="OK", 0,status=="Premium license larger than Core license",3,1=1,"OK") | eval severity_level_victoria=case(status=="N/A",-1,status=="No, seek Deal Desk approval for unbalanced Premium apps below 20% capacity", 2, status=="OK", 0,status=="Premium license larger than Core license",3,1=1,"OK") | table balanced_check value limit limit_classic limit_victoria severity_level severity_level_classic severity_level_victoria | `scma_summarize_data("licensing_premium_app_balanced")`

`scma_source_internal_index` source=*scheduler.log sourcetype=scheduler SavedSplunker earliest=-6d@w1 latest=-1d@w3 | rex "\,\s+app\=\"(?<app_context>\S+)\"" | `scma_instance_info(host)` | stats dc(user) AS dc_user values(reason) AS signature count AS total_searches count(eval(status="skipped")) AS search_skip_count last(name) as name by label app_context | eval pct_skipped=round(search_skip_count/total_searches * 100, 0) | eval signature=replace(signature, "[:=]", " "), value=pct_skipped | eval severity_level=case(value>0 AND value<=25,0,value>25 AND value<=50,2,value>50,3,1=1,0) | table name app_context value dc_user pct_skipped search_skip_count total_searches signature severity_level `scma_comment("#REDACT| foreach app_context [| eval <<FIELD>> = sha256(<<FIELD>>) ] #REDACT")` | `scma_summarize_data("search_skipped_searches")`

`scma_source_internal_index` source=*scheduler.log sourcetype=scheduler SavedSplunker status=skipped earliest=-6d@w1 latest=-1d@w3 | rex "\,\s+app\=\"(?<app_context>\S+)\"" | `scma_instance_info(host)` | stats count values(name) as name by app_context savedsearch_name search_type reason | rename reason AS signature | eval signature=replace(signature, "[:=]", " "), severity_level=2 | table name app_context search_type savedsearch_name count signature severity_level `scma_comment("#REDACT| foreach app_context,savedsearch_name [| eval <<FIELD>> = sha256(<<FIELD>>) ] #REDACT")` | `scma_summarize_data("search_skipped_searches_detail")`

`scma_source_audit_index` action=search user=* user!=splunk-system-user search_id=* info=completed earliest=-6d@w1 latest=-1d@w3 | `scma_instance_info(host)` | eval sparseness=(event_count/scan_count)*100, range=case((sparseness<=100 AND sparseness>10),"Dense - 10%",(sparseness<=10 AND sparseness>1),"Sparse - 1%",(sparseness<=1),"Rare - .01%",1=1,"N/A - Leading Pipe Searches") | stats count by range | eventstats sum(count) as perc | eval perc=round(count*100/perc,2) | eval severity_level = 1 | table range count perc severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("search_search_density")`

`scma_source_audit_index` action=search user=* user!=splunk-system-user search_id=* info=completed NOT app IN (scma*) earliest=-6d@w1 latest=-1d@w6 | eval search_name=if(savedsearch_name=="", search_id, savedsearch_name) | rex "\,\s+app\=\"(?<app_context>\S+)\"" | fillnull value="N/A" app_context | eval range=if((search_lt=="N/A" OR search_et=="N/A"),"All Time or N/A",tostring((search_lt-search_et),"duration")) | `scma_instance_info(host)` | stats max(event_count) AS event_count count AS search_runs max(total_run_time) AS run_time_sec dc(host) AS dc_instance last(name) as name by label search_name app_context range | where run_time_sec >= 300 | eval severity_level = case(run_time_sec>14400,"3", run_time_sec>3600,"2", run_time_sec>=300,"1",events>=0,0,1=1,0) | table name app_context dc_instance event_count range run_time_sec search_name search_runs severity_level `scma_comment("#REDACT| foreach app_context,search_name [| eval <<FIELD>> = sha256(<<FIELD>>) ] #REDACT")` | `scma_summarize_data("search_long_running_searches")`
search_post:
| eval search_range=coalesce(Range, search_range)
              | eval earliest=coalesce(Earliest, earliest)
              | eval latest=coalesce(Latest, latest)
              | eval run_time_hours=round(run_time_sec/60/60,2)
              | eval search_name = coalesce(search_name,savedsearch_name)
              | eval range_time = coalesce(range,search_range)
              | eval severity_level=case(range_time="All Time or N/A" AND run_time_hours>1,3,true(),1)
              | fieldformat event_count = printf("%'.0f",event_count)
              | sort  - severity_level
              | eval run_time_sec=tostring(run_time_sec, "commas")

search: | tstats summariesonly=t Values(data.search_props.search_head) As search_head Where `scma_source_introspection_index` sourcetype::splunk_resource_usage component::PerProcess data.search_props.sid::* earliest=-7d@d latest=@d By _time span=30s host data.search_props.sid | rename data.search_props.sid as sid | eval search_head=lower(coalesce(search_head,host)) | stats dc(sid) AS concurrency by _time search_head | bin span=1d _time | stats dc(search_head) AS dc_instance avg(concurrency) AS average_daily_concurrency perc95(concurrency) AS perc95_daily_concurrency max(concurrency) AS max_daily_concurrency by search_head | stats max(dc_instance) AS dc_instance sum(average_daily_concurrency) AS sum_total_concurrency_avg sum(perc95_daily_concurrency) AS sum_total_concurrency_perc95 sum(max_daily_concurrency) AS sum_total_concurrency_max | eval sum_total_concurrency_avg=round(sum_total_concurrency_avg,0), sum_total_concurrency_perc95=round(sum_total_concurrency_perc95,0), sum_total_concurrency_max=round(sum_total_concurrency_max,0) | join [| inputlookup scma_customer_details where _key=license_* | transpose 0 header_field=_key | fields - column | eval is_premium=if(license_es>0 OR license_pci>0 OR license_itsi>0,"premium_app_stack","core_only") ] | join license_core [| inputlookup override_lic.csv | fields license_core, concurrency_limit_core ] | join license_es [| inputlookup override_lic.csv | rename license_premium_es AS license_es | fields license_es concurrency_limit_es ] | join license_itsi [| inputlookup override_lic.csv | rename license_premium_itsi AS license_itsi | fields license_itsi concurrency_limit_itsi] | eval limit_classic = concurrency_limit_core + concurrency_limit_es + concurrency_limit_itsi, limit = limit_classic, limit_victoria = limit_classic | eval value = sum_total_concurrency_avg | eval severity_level = case(value > limit,2, dc_instance=0, 2, true(), 0) | eval severity_level_classic = case(value > limit_classic,2, dc_instance=0, 2, true(), 0) | eval severity_level_victoria = case(value > limit_victoria,2, dc_instance=0, 2, true(), 0) | fillnull value="Missing Search Data" sum_total_concurrency_avg severity_level value limit | table concurrency_limit_core concurrency_limit_es concurrency_limit_itsi dc_instance is_premium license_core license_es license_itsi license_pci limit limit_classic limit_victoria severity_level severity_level_classic severity_level_victoria sum_total_concurrency_avg sum_total_concurrency_max sum_total_concurrency_perc95 value | `scma_summarize_data("search_search_concurrency")`

`scma_source_internal_index` sourcetype=splunkd component=Metrics host=* source=*metrics.log group=search_concurrency "system total" active_hist_searches>0 earliest=-7d@d latest=@d | fields _time host active_hist_searches | `scma_instance_info(host)` | bin _time span=1d | stats perc95(active_hist_searches) AS active_hist_searches_p95 max(active_hist_searches) AS active_hist_searches_max last(name) as name by _time label | eval active_hist_searches_p95=ceiling(active_hist_searches_p95), active_hist_searches_max=ceiling(active_hist_searches_max) | join [| inputlookup scma_customer_details where _key=license_* | transpose 0 header_field=_key | fields - column | eval is_premium=if( license_es>0 OR license_pci>0 OR license_itsi>0,"premium_app_stack", "core_only" ) ] | join license_core [| inputlookup override_lic.csv | fields license_core, concurrency_limit_core ] | join license_es [| inputlookup override_lic.csv | rename license_premium_es AS license_es | fields license_es concurrency_limit_es ] | join license_itsi [| inputlookup override_lic.csv | rename license_premium_itsi AS license_itsi | fields license_itsi concurrency_limit_itsi] | eval is_premium = if( match(name,"^itsi|^es"), "premium_app_stack", "core_only" ) | eventstats values(is_premium) as is_premium_check | eval is_premium = if(match(is_premium_check, "premium_app_stack"), "premium_app_stack", is_premium ) | eval name = if(name==label, "other", name) | `get_cloud_limits(search_search_concurrency_stats)` | eval limit_classic = concurrency_limit_core + concurrency_limit_es + concurrency_limit_itsi , limit = limit_classic | eval limit_victoria_premium = if(is_premium = "premium_app_stack", limit_victoria_premium, 0) | eval limit_victoria = limit_victoria_core + limit_victoria_premium | eval severity_level = case(active_hist_searches_max > limit, 2, true(), 0) | eval severity_level_classic = case(active_hist_searches_max > limit_classic, 2, true(), 0) | eval severity_level_victoria = case(active_hist_searches_max > limit_victoria, 2, true(), 0) | eval timechart_time = _time | fillnull value="Missing Search Data" active_hist_searches_p95 active_hist_searches_max severity_level severity_level_classic severity_level_victoria limit_classic limit_victoria | table name timechart_time active_hist_searches_p95 active_hist_searches_max severity_level severity_level_classic severity_level_victoria limit_classic limit_victoria | `scma_summarize_data("search_search_concurrency_stats")`
search_post: | addtotals fieldname=total_concurrency | appendcols [| search splunk_server = * `scma_set_index` sourcetype="scma:import:lambda" scma_check_name="search_search_concurrency_stats" | eval _time=timechart_time | bin _time span=1d | stats latest(severity_level) as severity_level latest(limit_classic) as limit_classic latest(limit_victoria) as limit_victoria latest(host) as host latest(check_name) as check_name by _time | fields host severity_level limit_classic limit_victoria check_name ] | eval severity_level = case(total_concurrency > limit_victoria, 5, total_concurrency > limit_classic, 4, true(), 0)

search_name: Search - Sweet Spot App and Environment Check
search: | inputlookup scma_customer_details where _key=license_* OR _key=cloud_env OR _key=cloud_provider | transpose 0 header_field=_key | fields - column | makemv cloud_env | mvexpand cloud_env | foreach license_es license_pci license_itsi [ eval premium_apps=mvappend(premium_apps,if(<<FIELD>> >0,"<<FIELD>>",null()))] | eval premium_apps=if(isnull(premium_apps),"none_none",premium_apps) | mvexpand premium_apps | rename cloud_env AS environment cloud_provider AS provider | rex field=premium_apps "\w+\_(?<premium_apps>\w+)" | join environment premium_apps provider [| inputlookup sweet_spot_matrix.csv | eval environment_premium_app = 'environment' . "-" . 'premium_apps' ] | eval limit_value=case(premium_apps=="es",license_es.":".sweet_spot_ceiling,premium_apps=="pci",license_pci.":".sweet_spot_ceiling,premium_apps=="itsi",license_itsi.":".sweet_spot_ceiling,premium_apps=="none",license_core.":".sweet_spot_ceiling) | eval check_sweet_spot_core_none=if(environment_premium_app != "core-none", null(),if((license_core < sweet_spot_floor OR license_core > sweet_spot_ceiling) AND license_core > 0, "Seek Deal Desk search_name: Search - Search Counts by Type Last 7 Days
search: `scma_source_audit_index` search_id!="*rsa_*" search_id!="*RemoteStorageRetrieveBuckets_*" search_id!="*searchparsetmp_*" search_id!="*remote_*" search_id=* total_run_time earliest=-7d@d latest=@d | eval host_sid = 'host'.":".'search_id' | eval searchtype=case( match(search_id,"^\'?\d{10}\.\d+"),"ad_hoc", match(search_id,"^\'?md\_"),"metadata", match(search_id,"^\'?prd\.ph\_"),"parallel_reduce", match(search_id,"^\'?rt\_\d{10}\.\d+"),"real_time", match(search_id,"^\'?scheduler\_\_?"),"scheduled", match(search_id,"^\'?subsearch\_"),"subsearch", match(search_id,"^\'?summarize\_"),"summary", match(search_id,"^\'?SummaryDirector\_"),"report_acceleration", match(search_id,"^\'?ta\_"),"type_ahead", match(search_id,"^\'?alertsmanager"),"type_ahead", match(search_id,"^\'?\w+\_\_\w+\_\_"),"dashboard_panel",1=1,"unclassified") | bin _time span=1d | stats dc(host_sid) AS search_count by _time searchtype | stats avg(search_count) AS search_count_daily_avg by searchtype | eval search_count_daily_avg=round(search_count_daily_avg,0) | sort - search_count_daily_avg | addcoltotals labelfield=searchtype | eval severity_level = 1 | table searchtype search_count_daily_avg severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("search_count_by_type")`

`scma_source_audit_index` search_id!="'rsa_*" search_id!="'RemoteStorageRetrieveBuckets_*" search_id!="'searchparsetmp_*" search_id!="'remote_*" search_id=* (info=completed OR info=cancelled) NOT mcatalog earliest=-7d@d latest=@d | `scma_instance_info(host)` | rex field=search_et "'?(?<start_time>[^']+)'?" | rex field=search_lt "'?(?<end_time>[^']+)'?" | eval range=if(start_time=="N/A","All Time", (end_time-start_time)/86400) | eval search_range_in_days=case(range=="All Time","ALL TIME", range<1,"0-1", range>=1 AND range<=7,"1-7", range>7 AND range<=14,"7-14", range>14 AND range<21,"14-21", range>=21 AND range<90,"21-90", range>90,"90+") | eval search_range_in_days=if(match(search, "^[\s\']*\|") AND ! match(search, "^[\s\']*\|\s*(inputlookup|mstats|rest)"), "ALL TIME W/LEADING PIPE", 'search_range_in_days') | stats count by search_range_in_days | sort search_range_in_days | eventstats sum(count) as perc | eval perc=round(count*100/perc,2) | eval status=if((search_range_in_days="90+" OR search_range_in_days="ALL TIME") AND perc>20,"High Search Periodicity Over 90 Days","OK") | eval severity_level=if(status!="OK",2,0) | table search_range_in_days count perc severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("search_search_periodicity")`

"_ack_" . ack_sum | stats sum(unique_forwarders) AS unique_forwarders last(name) as name last(useACK) as useACK values(os) as fwd_os values(arch) as fwd_arch by label, destPort, version, fwdType | lookup scma_supported_forwarder_versions forwarder_version As version OUTPUT forwarder_cloud_versions, heavy_forwarder_support_end_date, univeral_forwarder_full_support_end_date, universal_forwarder_p3_support_end_date | eval status = if ( isnull(forwarder_cloud_versions), "!!out of support- consider upgrading!!", "Supported") | eval forwarder_support_end_date_epoch = if(fwdType="full", strptime(heavy_forwarder_support_end_date,"%B %d, %Y") , strptime(univeral_forwarder_full_support_end_date,"%B %d, %Y") ) | eval months_remaining_in_support = ceiling((forwarder_support_end_date_epoch - now()) / 86400 / 30) | fillnull value="!!out of support- consider upgrading!!" forwarder_cloud_versions, heavy_forwarder_support_end_date, univeral_forwarder_full_support_end_date | appendpipe [| stats count AS events sum(unique_forwarders) AS total_forwarders sum(eval(severity_level=2)) AS value] | eval fwd_os = mvjoin(fwd_os,","), fwd_arch = mvjoin(fwd_arch,",") | eval severity_level=case(status="!!out of support- consider upgrading!!",2, events=0,2, months_remaining_in_support < 0,2, months_remaining_in_support < 7,1, status="Supported",0, true(), "-1") | table name destPort events forwarder_cloud_versions forwarder_support_end_date_epoch fwdType heavy_forwarder_support_end_date months_remaining_in_support total_forwarders unique_forwarders univeral_forwarder_full_support_end_date universal_forwarder_p3_support_end_date version useACK fwd_os fwd_arch severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("forwarders_count_and_inventory")`

| rest `scma_rest_timeout` splunk_server=* /servicesNS/-/-/apps/local/ search="core!=1" | `scma_instance_info(host)` | eval server_roles=mvjoin(role, ":") | stats count AS install_instance_count dc(version) values(version) AS installed_version values(label) values(author) values(disabled) values(configured) values(server_roles) by title | rename values(*) AS * dc(*) AS dc_* title AS appid | lookup splunkbase_apps appid app_version AS installed_version | lookup splunkbase_apps appid OUTPUTNEW version_compatibility AS latest_version_compatibility app_version AS all_app_versions | eval uid=mvdedup(uid), eos_eol_regex_pattern="(?i)\seol|end of life|\seos|end of support", latest_app_version=mvindex(all_app_versions, 0), latest_version_compatibility=mvjoin(mvdedup(split(latest_version_compatibility, ",")), ",") | eval signature=case(match(description, eos_eol_regex_pattern) OR match(documentation, eos_eol_regex_pattern) OR match(is_archived, "(?i)true"), "ISSUE: The app has been marked as End of Life, End of Sale, or has been archived; further review is required", match(disabled, "1"), "ISSUE: At least one installation of this app is in disabled state; further review is required", dc_version > 1, "ISSUE: Multiple versions of the app found; further review is required", NOT match(version_compatibility, "8\.\d") AND match(latest_version_compatibility, "8\.\d"), "WARNING: App needs to be upgraded to gain Splunk 8.x support", isnull(passed_validation), "WARNING: No record of app passing AppInspect; further review is required", NOT match(version_compatibility, "8\.\d"), "WARNING: App is not Splunk 8.x certified; further review is required",1==1, "GOOD: App meets migration criteria; note, local customization will require additional review") | eval severity_level=case(match(signature, "^ISSUE"), 2, match(signature, "^WARNING"), 2, match(signature, "^GOOD"), 0, 1==1, 2) | eval app_type=if(isnotnull(latest_app_version), "splunkbase", "private") | rex field=label mode=sed "s/=/<equals>/g" | table uid appid label app_type installed_version latest_app_version signature severity_level `scma_comment("#REDACT| foreach appid,label [| eval <<FIELD>> = sha256(<<FIELD>>) ] #REDACT")` | `scma_summarize_data("apps_splunk_apps_vet_status")`

| tstats summariesonly=t Max(data.size) as size WHERE (`scma_source_introspection_index` component=KVStoreCollectionStats "data.size">0 earliest=-14d) BY host, "data.ns" | rename "data.*" as "*" | rex field=ns "(?<app>.*)\.(?<kvstore>.*)" | `scma_instance_info(host)` | stats Max(size) As collection_size_bytes latest(name) as name By label app kvstore | eventstats sum(collection_size_bytes) as total_collection_size_bytes_instance by label | eventstats sum(collection_size_bytes) as total_collection_size_bytes_global | eval collection_size_mb = collection_size_bytes / 1024 / 1024 , collection_size_gb = collection_size_mb / 1024 , total_collection_size_gb_instance = total_collection_size_bytes_instance / 1024 / 1024 / 1024, total_collection_size_gb_global = total_collection_size_bytes_global / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | eval severity_level = if(collection_size_gb > 25 OR total_collection_size_gb_instance > 100, 5, 1) , total = total_collection_size_gb_instance | table name app kvstore collection_size_mb collection_size_gb total_collection_size_gb_instance total_collection_size_gb_global severity_level `scma_comment("#REDACT| foreach app,kvstore [| eval <<FIELD>> = sha256(<<FIELD>>) ] #REDACT")` | `scma_summarize_data("kv_store_size")`

| rest `scma_rest_timeout` splunk_server=* /servicesNS/-/-/saved/searches search="eai:acl.app!=splunk_monitoring_console" search="eai:acl.app!=splunk_instrumentation" search="is_scheduled=1" search="disabled=0" | eval spl_actions=case(match(search, "\|\s*(?:sendemail|script|sendalert)\s"), "special command found in SPL"), actions=mvappend(split(actions, ", "), spl_actions) | where isnotnull(actions) AND actions!="" | rename eai:acl.* AS * dispatch.earliest_time AS dispatch_earliest_time dispatch.latest_time AS dispatch_latest_time | `scma_instance_info(splunk_server)` | stats values(search) values(cron_schedule) dc(actions) values(actions) dc(splunk_server) values(sharing) values(action.email.to) AS email_destinations last(name) as name by label, title, app, owner | rename values(*) AS * dc(*) AS dc_* title AS savedsearch_name owner AS user | rex field=savedsearch_name mode=sed "s/=/<equals>/g" | makemv delim="," email_destinations | eval email_destinations_count = mvcount(email_destinations) | eval is_enabled="true", is_scheduled="true" | eval severity_level=if(email_destinations_count>50,1,2) | table name app savedsearch_name sharing cron_schedule dc_splunk_server dc_actions actions dc_instance is_enabled is_scheduled email_destinations_count severity_level `scma_comment("#REDACT| foreach savedsearch_name [| eval <<FIELD>> = sha256(<<FIELD>>) ] #REDACT")` | `scma_summarize_data("search_scheduled_search_actions")`

search_name: Top 50 CPU and Memory Intensive Dashboards
search: | tstats summariesonly=t Sum(data.normalized_pct_cpu) As normalized_pct_cpu Sum(data.mem_used) As mem_used Sum(data.elapsed) As elapsed Sum(data.pct_memory) As pct_memory Where `scma_source_introspection_index` sourcetype=splunk_resource_usage component::PerProcess data.process_type::search AND data.search_props.type IN (ad-hoc) AND data.search_props.provenance = "UI:Dashboard:*" earliest=-14d@d latest=@d By _time span=10s host data.search_props.app data.search_props.provenance | rename data.search_props.* As * | fillnull value=0 | `scma_instance_info(host)` | where role="search_head" | stats Max(normalized_pct_cpu) As normalized_pct_cpu Max(mem_used) As mem_used Max(elapsed) As elapsed last(name) as name by label provenance | rex field=provenance mode=sed "s/UI:Dashboard://g" | sort 50 - normalized_pct_cpu,mem_used | eval severity_level = case ( normalized_pct_cpu > 10,1, normalized_pct_cpu > 20,1, true(), 0) | table name provenance elapsed mem_used normalized_pct_cpu severity_level | `scma_summarize_data("top_50_dashboards")`

| tstats summariesonly=t Sum(data.normalized_pct_cpu) As normalized_pct_cpu Where `scma_source_introspection_index` sourcetype=splunk_resource_usage data.process_type=search data.normalized_pct_cpu > 0 earliest=-14d@d latest=-0d@d By _time Span=1d host data.search_props.sid data.search_props.type data.search_props.app data.search_props.user | rename "data.search_props.*" As * , "data.*" As * | "SplunkEnterpriseSecuritySuite|Splunk_DA-ESS_PCICompliance|^DA-ESS|^SA-\w+Protection|^SA-\w+Management|SA-UEBA|SA-ThreatIntelligence|SA-Utils|Splunk_SA_ExtremeSearch|Splunk_SA_CIM|Splunk_Security_Essentials|splunk_app_eshealthcheck|^SecKit_|SA-ldapsearch"), "ES_base_apps", match(app, "^DA-ITSI|itsi|SA-IndexCreation|^SA-ITOA|^SA-ITSI|SA-UserAccess|vmware_ta_itsi|it_essentials_learn|splunk_app_infrastructure"), "ITSI_base_apps", match(app, "splunk_instrumentation|splunk_rapid_diag|splunk_instance_monitoring|splunk_archiver|system|splunk_monitoring_console|python_upgrade_readiness_app|^scma"), "Splunk_default_apps", match(app,"^search$|^launcher$"), "Search_app", true(), "Core_apps" ) | fields _time search_id host type Workload_Class app user normalized_pct_cpu | stats Sum(normalized_pct_cpu) As normalized_pct_cpu by _time, Workload_Class | eventstats Sum(normalized_pct_cpu) As total_normalized_pct_cpu by _time | eval Workload_Class_pct_cpu = normalized_pct_cpu / total_normalized_pct_cpu * 100 | fields _time Workload_Class Workload_Class_pct_cpu total_normalized_pct_cpu normalized_pct_cpu | join _time [| tstats summariesonly=t P99(data.cpu_system_pct) As cpu_system_pct | rest `scma_rest_timeout` /servicesNS/-/-/data/indexes-extended datatype=all search="disabled=0 AND isInternal=0" | rename title as orig_index | `scma_instance_info(splunk_server)` | stats sum(currentDBSizeMB) sum(totalEventCount) values(maxDataSize) values(maxTotalDataSizeMB) values(maxGlobalDataSizeMB) values(frozenTimePeriodInSecs) values(datatype) AS index_datatype last(name) as name dc(splunk_server) AS dc_splunk_server max(total_bucket_count) as bucket_count max(total_event_count) as event_count by label orig_index | rename sum(*) AS sum_* values(*) AS * dc(*) AS dc_* | eval signature=case( mvcount(split(maxDataSize, " ")) > 1, "ISSUE: multiple maxDataSize for same index", mvcount(split(maxTotalDataSizeMB, " ")) > 1, "ISSUE: multiple maxTotalDataSizeMB for same index", isnull(maxDataSize) OR isnull(frozenTimePeriodInSecs), "ISSUE: rest definition not found for the index", 1==1, "OK" ) | eval severity_level=if(match(signature, "^OK"), 0, 2) | foreach *_size [ eval <<FIELD>>=round(<<FIELD>>, 2)] | table name orig_index index_datatype bucket_count dc_splunk_server event_count frozenTimePeriodInSecs maxDataSize maxGlobalDataSizeMB maxTotalDataSizeMB sum_currentDBSizeMB sum_totalEventCount signature severity_level `scma_comment("#REDACT| foreach orig_index [| eval <<FIELD>> = sha256(<<FIELD>>) ] #REDACT")` | `scma_summarize_data("indexing_index_storage_size")`

| rest `scma_rest_timeout` /servicesNS/-/-/configs/conf-indexes search="storageType=remote" splunk_server=* | rename title AS instance | `scma_instance_info(splunk_server)` | stats dc(splunk_server) values(eai:acl.app) AS app, values(disabled), values(path), values(storageType), values(remote.s3.bucket_name), values(remote.s3.endpoint), values(remote.s3.encryption), values(remote.s3.list_objects_version), values(remote.s3.auth_region) values(name) as name by instance | rename values(*) AS * dc(*) AS dc_* | eval "remote.s3.encryption" = if(isnull('remote.s3.encryption') OR 'remote.s3.encryption'="", "none", 'remote.s3.encryption') | eval signature = "SmartStore was detected. earliest=-3d `scma_source_internal_index` source=*metrics.log sourcetype=splunkd group=bundle_replication name=bundle_metadata bundle_type=full_bundle | `scma_instance_info(host)` | stats max(bundle_bytes) AS max_full_bundle_size values(role) as server_roles last(name) as name by label | eval max_full_bundle_size_mb = round(max_full_bundle_size/1024/1024,2) ,server_roles=mvjoin(server_roles, ":") | eval signature=if( max_full_bundle_size_mb > 3000, "Bundle size is over 3000 MB, please review content", "Normal bundle size") | fields - max_full_bundle_size | `get_cloud_limits(search_bundle_size)` | eval limit = limit_classic | eval severity_level = if(max_full_bundle_size_mb > limit, 2, 0) | eval severity_level_classic = if(max_full_bundle_size_mb > limit_classic, 2, 0) | eval severity_level_victoria = if(max_full_bundle_size_mb > limit_victoria, 2, 0) | table name server_roles max_full_bundle_size_mb signature limit limit_classic limit_victoria severity_level severity_level_classic severity_level_victoria | `scma_summarize_data("search_bundle_size")`
